lanes.detail: Test conflates backend.is_available() (first-use subprocess call) with import-time subprocess spawn. Production code does NOT spawn subprocess at import. Test design error, not production regression.

fp1_hardcoded_home_in_security_paths.detail: No /Users/vojtechhamada in security/ directory. get_secure_enclave_helper_path() uses Path(__file__).resolve() correctly.

fp2_recipient_private_key_b64_in_product.detail: ExportEncryptionEnvelope has no recipient_private_key_b64 attribute. Only in test assertions and documentation comments. All 17 F206AE tests confirm.

fp3_old_emergency_ram_gb_runtime_usage.detail: EMERGENCY_RAM_GB=6.2 in resource_allocator.py vs uma_budget CRITICAL=6.5. Threshold inversion is Conflict C4 (MEDIUM), documented in F206AJ matrix and F206AL tests. test_threshold_inversion_fixed PASSED. Not a regression.

fp4_canonical_owner_count_greater_than_o.detail: test_exactly_one_canonical_owner PASSED. Matrix shows exactly one verdict per module.

fp5_active_runtime_by_directory_prefix.detail: test_active_runtime_is_explicit_paths PASSED. Active runtime uses explicit file-path lists, not directory-prefix scanning.

Hermes3 Engine.md: speculative decoding tests claimed production capability
